all scores reflect that.\n- **Obfuscation:** None present.\n- **Security risk:** Very low, given the code only facilitates read-only interactions.\n\n### My own estimates:\n- **Malware score:** 0 — no signs of malicious activity.\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0 — code is clear and standard.\n- **Risk score:** 0 — since the code is only for creating interfaces and connecting to known, read-only functions, and no user input or dynamic execution is involved.\n\n**Final notes:** The only minor point is the small risk score of 0.1 in some reports, which I consider slightly overestimating given the nature of the code.
